name: xdm_streaming_media_overlay
description: Adds robust HLS and DASH acquisition, live refresh, resumable fragment checkpoints, AES-128 HLS, yt-dlp and FFmpeg providers, format/subtitle selection, health diagnostics and deterministic recorded fixtures.
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Do not invoke external media tools through a shell
Preserve fragment checkpoints after cancellation for deterministic resume
